page_content:
Restriction: Freshman or Sophomore Standing.

UNIV218 Study Abroad Exploration (3 Credits)

Topics and assignments will vary by travel site.

Restriction: Must be in designated Study Abroad programs. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

UNIV269 Connecting Across Cultures (1 Credit)

An examination of culture to guide study abroad students through the stages of cross cultural adjustment and to promote cultural competency by providing the motivation, knowledge and skills necessary to work with diverse individuals and teams.

Restriction: Must be in a study abroad program.
